member.name: T:Unity.VectorGraphics.SVGImageEditor
member.summary: Editor class used to edit UI Sprites.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.SVGImageEditor.AddSVGImage(UnityEditor.MenuCommand)
member.summary: Adds the SVG Image menu item.
member.param: The menu command into which to insert the menu item.

member.name: P:Unity.VectorGraphics.Editor.SVGImporterDataProvider.spriteImportMode
member.remarks: For SVG files, the import mode is always "single"

member.name: P:Unity.VectorGraphics.Editor.SVGImporterDataProvider.pixelsPerUnit
member.summary: Returns pixels per unit of the imported SVG

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Editor.SVGImporterDataProvider.UnityEditor#U2D#Sprites#ISpriteEditorDataProvider#GetSpriteRects
member.returns: An array of the sprite rectangles

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Editor.SVGImporterDataProvider.UnityEditor#U2D#Sprites#ISpriteEditorDataProvider#SetSpriteRects(UnityEditor.SpriteRect[])
member.param: The new sprite rectangles to use

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Editor.SVGImporterDataProvider.UnityEditor#U2D#Sprites#ISpriteEditorDataProvider#GetDataProvider``1
member.summary: Gets the data provider for a given type
member.typeparam: The type of the data provider

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Editor.SVGImporterDataProvider.UnityEditor#U2D#Sprites#ISpriteEditorDataProvider#HasDataProvider(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the data provider for a given type
member.returns: True if a data provider is available for the type, or false otherwise
